review_title: Aldoa is changing the world of environmental remediation!
description: Aldoa solves every business problem I've ever encountered with billability, efficiency, organizational leadership, prioritizing tasks and transparent communication
author: Samantha W.
pros: Impactful, easy to use, efficient, and everything that bosses want employees to do without spending too much time and funds.
cons: I can't think of any cons. Team Aldoa is transparent, communicative and fast to respond.

review_title: Game Changer for my Engineering Business
description: Excellent! We had a fairly quick transition process with minimal complications. I have been very pleased with the customer support for any questions we have or minor updates we think would be useful. The Aldoa team seems to be really motivated to build out more products and integrations which means I won't be stuck in 2025 forever but will continue to progress as the world changes.
author: Ian P.
pros: The integration of client tracking, project tasks, and a budget system really streamlines our process. As a small engineering firm, this really fills the gaps of being able to keep track of all of our products in a seamless system.
cons: I do a good amount of work in the field and the system is difficult to use on my phone.

description: In one word excellent. they have provided an app that we can access anywhere and keep our projects all in order without the need to set up each task/timeframe individually. The continued support means that our version of Aldoa is customized to our company.
author: Benjamin Z.
pros: Aldoa automatically creates timeframes and tracks projects in one App, allowing for instance access for our whole team. There is no guesswork in wondering when something is due, or what was done on a project when a manager is out. Customer service is great, and we can add new features as we need them by working with the Aldoa team.
cons: While Aldoa aggregates all the projects together, navigating between them can be tough when you have 80-100 ongoing projects, This is another place we need to keep updated, besides our personal server, cloud, and accounting software.

description: Very positive; staff is excellent and the product is better than expected.
author: charles W.
pros: It is flexible and the staff are willing to customize it to our needs.
cons: I am still getting used to creating budgets and invoices.

description: We use Aldoa for project tracking, budget variances and time tracking. So far the relationship has worked out well. I look forward to learning more about Aldoa and using its features more effectively.
author: Julie T.
pros: Ease of use of the GPS features. Ease of setting up project budgets. Ease of entering and tracking time.
cons: The fact that Aldoa is not compatible with my financial software.

review_title: Every environmental consultant is going to be using this soon...
description: Excellent. The training experience was thorough and easily understandable. The company has been very responsive and helpful as we use new features or train new employees.
author: Brandy L.
pros: The responsiveness of the team behind the software. When I first considered Aldoa, I made a list of the features I truly needed to make it worthwhile for our company. When I realized there was an important function it didn't have, the team added it within weeks. Although I was nervous about investing so much time in a relatively new software solution, I think the newness of it has been part of the strength. The engineers at Aldoa have taken time to solicit our feedback and seem to be regularly evolving and upgrading the software to suite their clients' needs. I feel like it is software that will grow with us as a company.
cons: We have found a few glitches, presumably because the software is new, and there are many ways to use each feature. But the company has been quick to respond and resolve them.

review_title: Revenue Capture and Time Saving Software
author: Jillian O.
pros: Aldoa is the perfect platform for small business, but it really can even be integrated for larger companies as well. Ease of use, many critical functions that help to ensure you are not missing revenue through time and expense tracking, poor budgeting, or task management. Aldoa is a one-stop software and provides transparency for the whole project team, so everyone has "ownership" on the project and can work toward meeting the project objectives on time and on budget.
cons: The only negative I have had so far with using Aldoa is syncing with Quickbooks desktop, but honestly I think that is on the Quickbooks side and not Aldoa. You do not have to sync or integrate the two softwares. You can use Aldoa for everything you need to run the "business" end of your business, including invoice generation. I just have several clients with very specific invoicing needs that it was easier for me integrate across the platforms (which I guess is really a "pro").
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The product is great and I have had nothing to complain about! I highly recommend the product and the team.
author: Andrew A.
pros: I was using another software previously and the switch to Aldoa was quick and easy. The software is great, very easy to work with and learn and the customer service response is great if any issues arise.
cons: None that I can think of. I like the entire software package and dont have any complaints.

description: [sensitive content hidden] understand the environmental business in New Jersey and their software fits a crucial need especially for Licensed Site Remediation Professionals (LSRPs). Even those who are not LSRPs could use this dynamic tool.
author: David P.
pros: As a solo practitioner it provides me with administrative assistance and keeps me on schedule
cons: Data input of existing clients was daunting, but [sensitive content hidden] assisted with the upload of my projects
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Karen L.
pros: I have not been using the program long enough to carve out one thing I liked best.
cons: some of the fields are confusing and do not quite comport with our business model. the guys have listened and adjusted the field for me as needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Engineering and Environmental Consulting Firms - Check Out Aldoa, the All-In-One Platform
description: The entire staff from the [sensitive content hidden] to the sales representative are responsive to my emails.
author: Rose D.
pros: Presently using the Aldoa program for a few months now and I like how its easy to use. The designers work with you if there is something specialized that you need.
cons: Aldoa's still working on enhancing new features. At the moment, for timesheets, the program is a little too rigid. The software designer and [sensitive content hidden] were receptive to our input and they are presently integrating changes to the timesheet program based on our recommendations.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: WE have not used it enough to provide a statement,
author: Carmen P.
pros: I am most pleased with the customer support. The Aldoa staff is more than willing to help problem solve and they make sure the user is benefitting from the product.
cons: As with most all software the designers dont often have a full grasp of what each consultant does.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
